---
description: "Use when replacing a rough concept placeholder with polished Odontotos project copy and concrete direction."
name: "Concept Placeholder"
argument-hint: "Paste the placeholder text, note, or rough concept to refine"
agent: "Odontotos Frontend Specialist"
---
Refine the provided concept placeholder into production-usable project direction for the Odontotos Railway landing page.

Input: ${input:Paste the placeholder text or rough idea}

Use these project references as the source of truth:
- [Project concept](../../docs/concept.md)
- [Project context](../../docs/project-context.md)

Requirements:
- Preserve the cinematic tourism storytelling direction of the site.
- Keep the result specific to the Odontotos Railway, Vouraikos Gorge, and the current landing-page scope.
- Write the output in Greek.
- Replace vague or filler wording with concrete, usable language.
- If the placeholder is underspecified, make the smallest reasonable assumptions and label them clearly.

Return exactly these sections:
## Βελτιωμένη Ιδέα
Provide a concise polished version of the concept text in Greek.

## Κενά Ή Υποθέσεις
List ambiguities, contradictions, or assumptions that still need confirmation in Greek.

## Προτεινόμενη Επόμενη Επεξεργασία
Suggest the single best next document or UI area to update based on the refined concept, in Greek.
